message:
chore(beads): record review-a9-fuzz follow-on entries (sse, ratelimit, websocket)

Updates to .beads/issues.jsonl reflecting status changes on three REVIEW-A9
fuzz-coverage tracking entries surfaced during this session:

- flywheel_connectors-2qsbc — SSE event-stream parser fuzz target. Now
  has the harness landed (commit d25c9216 / fuzz_sse_event_stream).
- flywheel_connectors-8714g — fcp-ratelimit/headers.rs fuzz target
  (HTTP rate-limit header parser). Tracking entry refreshed.
- flywheel_connectors-q4kuy — fcp-streaming/websocket.rs fuzz target
  (WS frame opcode/length/payload parser). Tracking entry refreshed.

Pure tracker-state delta: 3 lines updated and 3 added; no source-code
changes accompany this commit. Captured separately from the fuzz-target
implementation commits so the audit trail of who-did-what stays clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
